info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud EduTutor proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud EduTutor API

parameters.description: The Model Studio workspace ID used for the current request.
parameters.name: workspaceId

schema.description: The Model Studio workspace ID used for the current request.

image.description: The URL of the exam paper or question image.

extract_images.description: Indicates whether temporary OSS URLs of sub-questions are returned, facilitating direct use in subsequent answering.

struct.description: Indicates whether structured information is returned.

input_tokens.description: The number of tokens consumed by the input of this invocation.

output_tokens.description: The number of tokens consumed by the output of this invocation.

requestId.description: The request ID. Each request has a unique value, which facilitates troubleshooting.
